arts.sum: Liverpool make the long trip to Plymouth in the FA Cup’s fourth round this afternoon. Arne Slot’s side booked their place in the Carabao Cup final on Thursday night and are targeting progress in another cup competition. arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Devon to face Plymouth Argyle in the fourth round of the FA Cup this afternoon.
